title: Add RagmyAI to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [RagmyAI](https://ragmyai.com) to image
- Use RagmyAI to generate images like ChatGPT. RagmyAI uses pollinations.ai for image generation.

Fixes #10101

gist.headline: RagmyAI enters the greenhouse
gist.blurb: RagmyAI just landed in our community showcase! It's a slick new way to generate images through chat, powered by Pollinations.
gist.summary: Added RagmyAI, a ChatGPT-style conversational interface for generating images via Pollinations, to the community app directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and try RagmyAI directly from the community greenhouse to generate images through chat.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot looking at a retro computer screen that shows a chat bubble magically printing out a colorful picture, representing a chat-to-image app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot looking at a retro computer screen displaying a chat bubble that is magically printing out a colorful pixel picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot looking at a retro computer screen displaying a chat bubble that is magically printing out a colorful pixel picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes, emotionally warm.
